<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Client\Credentials; /** * Class Basic * Read-only container for api key and secret. */ class Basic extends AbstractCredentials { /** * Create a credential set with an API key and secret. */ public function __construct($key, $secret) { $this->credentials['api_key'] = (string)$key; $this->credentials['api_secret'] = (string)$secret; } }
